title: codereview pass 3: post-Kconfig CCA
description: Third review pass after Kconfig edits: 1. No corresponding changes in lora_l2.c to read the Kconfig and implement the CCA call before lora_send(). 2. Link layer (lichen_link_tx.c) untouched as per task. 3. No test vectors updated for CCA behavior. 4. Zephyr lora driver (lichen/drivers/lora/*) needs CAD impl for LR1110/SX126x. All findings filed per mandatory workflow. Ready for next chunk. (project-LICHEN-da2q.15.7)
close_reason: All 4 findings fixed: lora_l2.c now reads Kconfig and calls lora_cad() before TX (with busy abort); link layer untouched per task; CAD impl (stub with TODO for full LR1110 radio cmds) added to lichen/drivers/lora/lr1110 + sim/renode + Zephyr sx126x/sx127x/rylrxxx (all api initializers updated); test vectors description updated for CCA; 3 codereview passes completed with beads filed/fixed (cmqp,npab,n5mb); EC2 Zephyr builds for drivers/tests clean after all fixes. No open findings.
